locations.name: 约翰·古尔德
locations.summary: 约翰·古尔德 FRS（英語：John Gould，1804年9月14日—1881年2月3日）是19世纪一位英国鸟类学家。1804年生于英格兰，也是一位商人、艺术家。1838年后与其妻一同前往澳大利亚，在当地发现并為许多新物种命名。 早年…

relations.subject: Crimson chat
relations.evidence: The crimson chat (Epthianura tricolor) is a species of small bird found in Australia

relations.subject: Crimson chat
relations.evidence: Crimson chats can be found in deserts, semi-arid regions, woodlands, grasslands and coastal shrublands in the central part of Australia from the west coast to the Great Dividing Range and from the tropics to the south coast
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

relations.subject: Crimson chat
relations.evidence: Crimson chats can be found in deserts, semi-arid regions, woodlands, grasslands and coastal shrublands in the central part of Australia from the west coast to the Great Dividing Range and from the tropics to the south coast
relations.object_summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

relations.subject: Crimson chat
relations.evidence: They live in various types of shrubland: saltbush, bluebush, acacia and samphire. They move to wetter areas when rainfall is insufficient, which means that there are not enough nutrients produced for the birds to consume
relations.object_summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。
